terms.definition: A low area of land between two hills or mountains. Rivers often flow through valleys.
terms.exampleUsage: The Valley of Flowers is a beautiful valley in the Himalayas.

terms.definition: The highest mountain range in the world, stretching across northern India and other countries. The name means 'abode of snow'.
terms.exampleUsage: The Himalayas have snow-covered peaks that can be seen from far away.

terms.definition: A protected area set up by the government where plants and animals are kept safe from harm. Hunting and cutting trees is not allowed.
terms.exampleUsage: The Valley of Flowers National Park is home to hundreds of rare flowers.

terms.definition: A special place recognised by the United Nations as being very important to the world because of its natural beauty or cultural value.
terms.exampleUsage: The Valley of Flowers became a UNESCO World Heritage Site because of its unique flowers.

terms.definition: When a type of plant or animal has very few left and might disappear from the world forever.
terms.exampleUsage: The snow leopard is an endangered animal found near the Valley of Flowers.

terms.definition: All the plants and flowers found in a particular area. The Valley of Flowers has very rich flora.
terms.exampleUsage: The flora of the valley includes orchids, poppies, and daisies.

terms.definition: All the animals found in a particular area. The region around the valley has diverse fauna.
terms.exampleUsage: The fauna of the Himalayan region includes snow leopards and musk deer.

terms.definition: The careful protection of plants, animals, and natural places so they are not destroyed or lost.
terms.exampleUsage: Conservation efforts have helped protect the rare flowers in the valley.

terms.definition: Relating to high mountain areas. Alpine meadows are grassy areas found high up in mountains where beautiful flowers grow.
terms.exampleUsage: The Valley of Flowers is an alpine meadow with hundreds of flower species.

terms.definition: The variety of different plants and animals living in one area. A place with many different species has high biodiversity.
terms.exampleUsage: The Valley of Flowers has incredible biodiversity with over 600 types of plants.
